title: MikroTik QSFP-DD optical module DDQ+85MP01D, 400G
description: QSFP-DD is optical module for reliable 400 Gbps fiber connections. The transmission can operate over a distance of up to 100 m . The module includes built-in digital diagnostics for optical power, voltage, temperature, laser bias current, and other key parameters To achieve the maximum 400G speed, the optical module should be connected using an MTP/MPO-16 (Type-B, femaleâfemale) cable
